subject: (no subject)
body:
Hey Jeffrey,

I just wanted to let you know there was a woman sitting around your house when i arrived and she was walking behind me as i left.? i described her to G and she thinks it's the same woman that was hanging around her house. 

Dana

________________________________________________________________________
Email and AIM finally together. You've gotta check out free AOL Mail! - http://mail.aol.com
